ham.subject: Reminder: Semester Project Submission Deadline Approaching
ham.body:
Hi [Name],

Just a quick reminder that the semester project submission deadline is on 5th December. Please make sure to upload your report and project files on the university portal before the deadline.

If you have any questions or need an extension, let me know.

Thanks,
[Professor Name]

spam.subject: Immediate Action Required: Income Tax Refund Verification
spam.body:
Dear Taxpayer,

Your income tax refund of INR 125,000 is pending. To release the refund, you must verify your bank account details at <URL>.

Please complete the verification within 48 hours. Failure to do so may result in withholding of your refund.

Thank you for your prompt action.

Regards,
Income Tax Department
